subject: Re: coming into my own
body:
great


----- Original Message ----
From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>
To: JE <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, August 30, 2007 2:45:42 AM
Subject: coming into my own


My dearest, dearest Jeffrey,
I'm finally coming into my own! 
 
On Sunday I will start working for Al Madina (real estate investment) as the Client Relationship Manager. Between looking to rent a beautiful 2.5 bedroom apt and an upgraded rental car, I will cement that I'll never get another date again! No man will date a woman like that. 
 
However, I am very happy!!! 
 
Al Madina gave me everything I requested without flinching so I believe they will make me work like a dog. 

I hope all is well. 
Always thinking of you,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062

great
